pages.title: ASK4SAM - Silberstein & Miklos, P.C.
pages.text: Silberstein and Miklos, P.C., ASK4SAM. $1 Billion Recovered. Our attorneys and lawyers have been representing injured people successfully for more than 30 years throughout the five boroughs of New York City: the Bronx, Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, Nassau and Suffolk counties. Our personal injury attorneys and medical malpractice lawyers fight for accident victims. Attorney Sam Silberstein and attorney Steven Miklos lead our team of attorneys. Call our lawyers today for a free consultation with an attorney.

pages.title: Testimonials
pages.text: Client testimonials for our personal injury attorneys and medical malpractice lawyers. Real client results from real cases handled by our attorneys.

corpus.footerText: Silberstein & Miklos, P.C., serving the five boroughs of New York City.
